description_long: This self-service payment kiosk or terminal features a robust, rectangular structure with a predominantly black exterior and a front-facing panel that is accented with orange and silver. The front panel is decorated with several colorful stickers, giving it a casual, urban appearance. A small, rectangular display screen and a payment interface are located on the upper left of the front panel, while a larger orange section occupies the center, likely serving as the main interaction area. Below the main panel, there are two horizontal slots, possibly for receipts or cash, and a small drawer or compartment. The sides and back of the kiosk are solid black with subtle geometric indents, providing a sturdy and tamper-resistant look. The overall design suggests durability and functionality for outdoor or semi-outdoor urban environments.
description: A sturdy, black self-service payment kiosk with an orange-accented front panel, display screen, and payment interface, decorated with stickers and featuring multiple slots and compartments.
description_view_0: The left side of the kiosk, showing a solid black surface with subtle geometric indents and no visible interactive features.
description_view_1: The front view, displaying the orange-accented panel with stickers, a display screen, payment interface, and two horizontal slots or compartments.
description_view_2: The right side, mirroring the left with a solid black surface and geometric indents, lacking any interactive elements.
description_view_3: The rear view, showing a plain, solid black surface with no visible features or openings.
attribute_display_screen: A small, rectangular display screen is present on the upper left of the front panel, vertically oriented with a thin bezel and a light blue interface.
attribute_payment_interface: A payment interface is located directly below the display screen on the front panel, likely a card reader or NFC tap area, rectangular in shape with a dark slot.
attribute_branding_or_logo: No formal branding or logo is visible, but several colorful stickers are present on the front panel, adding decorative elements.
attribute_instructional_signage: No explicit instructional signage is visible, though the stickers may include icons or pictograms.
attribute_receipt_dispenser: A horizontal slot below the main orange panel on the front likely serves as a receipt dispenser, easily accessible and rectangular in shape.
